infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FOMO uses your location to show events near you on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FOMO uses your camera so you can capture photos and videos for posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FOMO needs access to your photos so you can choose media for posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FOMO needs permission to save photos and videos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FOMO uses your microphone when recording videos.
